subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the servant unto her who hath believed in God, her Lord, and hath been numbered among the devout in the Mother Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی العبد الی التی آمنت بالله ربها و کانت من القانتات فی ام الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
